title: certified stdlib first parts
manager: The first certified standard-library components — debounce, retry, breaker, limiter, saga, turnstile — each shipping with an interface card stating its verified properties. These are the reusable, proven building blocks the whole verification stack was built to enable: instead of everyone reimplementing a circuit breaker slightly wrong, you compose a certified one whose guarantees are already proven and travel with it in its certificate.
cs: certified stdlib first parts (debounce/retry/breaker/limiter/saga/turnstile) with interface cards; reusable proven components; needs the certificate machinery (W8.19).
